blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,998 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
